name: Joe Bell

contactInfo.office: 143 W. Main St., Suite 101, Groveton, TX 75845

bio: Joe Bell serves as the County Attorney for Trinity County, handling criminal prosecutions and providing legal counsel to the county. He is dedicated to serving the residents of Groveton and the surrounding Trinity County community.
campaignPromises: Provide effective prosecution of criminal cases
Protect the legal interests of Trinity County
Support victims of crime and their families
Maintain fiscal responsibility in the county attorney's office
Collaborate with law enforcement on public safety
